name: Shenyang Huitian Thermal Power Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenyang Huitian Thermal Power Co.,Ltd operates as central heating company in China. It is also involved in the installation of equipment, construction of industrial pipelines, and civil engineering activities. In addition, the company manufactures and installs non-standard structural parts; sells ammonium sulfate; and retails plumbing materials. It operates three branches. The company was formerly known as Shenyang Thermal Power Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenyang Huitian Thermal Power Co.,Ltd in January 1997. Shenyang Huitian Thermal Power Co.,Ltd was founded in 1980 and is based in Shenyang, China.
